allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(data\)\); print\(list\(data.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else f''Array of {len\(data\)} items''\); item = data[0] if isinstance\(data, list\) else list\(data.values\(\)\)[0]; print\(json.dumps\(item, indent=2\)[:2000]\)")
